name: Seven-Layer Dip
recipeIngredient: 21 oz Bean dip; plain or jalepeno
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel, pit and mash the avocados in a medium bowl.
2. Add lemon juice, salt, and pepper to the mashed avocado mixture.
3. In a separate bowl, combine sour cream, mayonnaise, and taco seasoning mix.
4. To assemble, spread bean dip on a large, shallow platter.
5. Top with the avocado mixture.
6. Sprinkle with chopped onions, tomatoes, and olives.
7. Cover with shredded cheddar cheese.
